alkylation reagent: after dithiothreitol reduction and iodoacetamide alkylation
cleavage agent: digested with porcine trypsin (Sequencing grade modified; Promega, Madison, WI) overnight at 37 °C
collision energy: normalized collision energy was set at 30%
instrument: Peptides were directly injected into a Thermo Orbitrap Exploris 480
ionization type: using a nano-electrospray ion source with electrospray voltages of 2.2 kV
reduction reagent: after dithiothreitol reduction and iodoacetamide alkylation
